query:
INSERT INTO coupons (code, description, discountType, discountValue, minPurchase, usageLimit, usedCount, applicableTo, isActive, expiresAt, source)
VALUES ('TRIPADVISOR-BOGO', 'Buy One Get One Free Tour - Thank you for your TripAdvisor review!', 'bogo', 100.00, 0, 1000, 0, 'tours', true, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR), 'review_reward');
